introSection: Shark Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 鲨鱼过山车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sanya Haichang Fantasy Town in Haitang, Sanya, Hainan, China. It opened with an expansion of the park on 31 December 2021. It has white track and yellow supports.
fullText: Shark Coaster (Simplified Chinese: 鲨鱼过山车) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sanya Haichang Fantasy Town in Haitang, Sanya, Hainan, China. It opened with an expansion of the park on 31 December 2021. It has white track and yellow supports.
